title: Is Item ID unique to a board or unique globally?
excerpt:
There’re a few IDs in monday that i’m not quite sure of, 
Board id 
User id 
Account id 
Item Id 
Could you explain a little more ?

posts.author: cokihim (Cohikim)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’re a few IDs in monday that i’m not quite sure of,

Board id
User id
Account id
Item Id

Could you explain a little more ?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @cokihim

All these ID are globally unique (although no guarantee that is will never change).

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @cokihim!

As @basdebruin said, those IDs are unique. There are not two boards/users/accounts/items with the same ID.

These IDs are set automatically and can not be changed.

Please let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
